description: Cloudflare DNS records — CNAME to ALB/CloudFront with proxy enabled

records.name: api
records.comment: Backend API — proxied through Cloudflare for DDoS/rate-limiting

setup_instructions: Replace <ALB_DNS_NAME> and <CLOUDFRONT_DISTRIBUTION_DOMAIN> with actual values from CloudFormation outputs. Create records via Cloudflare dashboard or API: POST /zones/{zone_id}/dns_records
